game_info.title: Alien Escape - Survive the Chaos
game_info.concept:
Escape a chaotic alien planet by fighting through hordes of frenzied monsters – with your friends, or on your own. Combine loot in surprising ways and master each character until you become the havoc you feared upon your first crash landing.

SURVIVE AN ALIEN PLANET
Over a dozen handcrafted locales await, each packed with challenging monsters and enormous bosses that oppose your continued existence. Fight your way to the final boss and escape or continue your run indefinitely to see just how long you can survive. A unique scaling system means both you and your foes limitlessly increase in power over the course of a game.



DISCOVER POWERFUL NEW ITEMS
More than 110 items keep each run fresh and full of new challenge. The more items you collect, the more their effects combine, the more surprising some of those combinations might be. The more items you encounter, the more lore (and strategy) you’ll discover through the logs.



UNLOCK NEW WAYS TO PLAY
Unlock a crew of eleven playable survivors, each with their own unique combat style and alternate skills to master. Learn the secrets of the Artifacts to toggle gameplay modifiers like friendly fire, random survivor spawns, item selection and more. With randomized stages, enemies, and items, no run will ever be the same.



PLAY SOLO OR CO-OP
Tackle the adventure solo or with up to three friends in online co-op, or compete in the rotating challenge of the Prismatic Trials. Brand new survivors like the Captain and MUL-T join classic survivors such as the Engineer, Huntress, and--of course--the Commando.
game_info.description: You've crash-landed on a hostile alien planet swarming with mutated creatures. Fight through waves of increasingly powerful enemies, collect powerful items that combine in unexpected ways, and survive long enough to reach the teleporter and escape. Each item you collect stacks and synergizes, creating unique builds. The longer you survive, the harder enemies become, but so do you. Can you master the chaos and make it off this nightmare world alive?
game_info.controls:
Arrow Keys / WASD: Move character in 8 directions
Space: Jump (double jump available)
Z: Primary attack (shoot projectile)
Shift: Use special ability (cooldown based)
ENTER: Start game from main menu
ESC: Pause/unpause game
R: Restart to main menu after game over

TEST_1.test_description: Testing basic player movement, collision detection, and combat mechanics. This validates that the core gameplay loop functions correctly with player control, enemy spawning, projectile firing, and hit detection working as intended.
TEST_1.strategy_description: Move the character around the arena using all directional inputs, jump to test platforming, fire projectiles at enemies, and collect items that spawn. Test collision with enemies and platforms to ensure proper physics response.
TEST_1.expected_outcome: Player should move smoothly in all directions, jump with proper gravity, fire projectiles that damage enemies on contact, collect items that appear, and take damage when touching enemies. All collision systems should work without errors.
